post.message: Source file server/src/agenticLoop/loop.ts was modified but no test file in the repository imports it, directly or transitively. If this PR claimed to fix a failing test, the fix likely missed the failing code path.
post.judgeRationale: judge dissented: The PR introduces a shared `createChatCompletion` helper that unconditionally uses `max_completion_tokens` and updates all callers to use it, thereby fixing the code path to always use the correct token limit parameter.

post.message: Function "chatCompletionTokenLimit" was renamed to "createChatCompletion" in server/src/llm/openaiClient.ts but 1 caller reference to "chatCompletionTokenLimit" remain in this PR (server/src/llm/openaiClient.ts).

- export function chatCompletionTokenLimit(
+ export async function createChatCompletion(
post.judgeRationale: judge refuted the block: The refactoring correctly updates all callers to use the new `createChatCompletion` helper and `maxTokens` parameter, ensuring no dangling references remain.

post.message: Source branch added in server/src/llm/openaiClient.ts with no compensating test addition in this PR. Likely coverage erosion.
The judge found the PR does not deliver its stated fix: the claimed condition is still unhandled.
post.evidence: claim: Always use max_completion_tokens via shared chat completion helper.
post.judgeRationale: The diff only modifies a TypeScript build info file and contains no source code changes to implement the stated intent.
